coaster_cc_invertingsuspended_desc.source: Feel the wind in your wings on this suspended coaster as you fly through hair-raising twists and loops!
coaster_cc_invertingsuspended_desc.translation: Feel the wind in your wings on this suspended coaster as you fly through hair-raising twists and loops!

coaster_cc_sitdowncoasterstock_desc.source: A high-octane launched coaster, with updated cars and restraints, and a variety of inverted pieces.
coaster_cc_sitdowncoasterstock_desc.translation: A high-octane launched coaster, with updated cars and restraints, and a variety of inverted pieces.

coaster_cc_sprint500stock_desc.source: This coaster boasts a hydraulic launch system to set your guests racing around the track.
coaster_cc_sprint500stock_desc.translation: This coaster boasts a hydraulic launch system to set your guests racing around the track.
